title: Voronezh、Voronezh Oblast — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Voronezh、Voronezh Oblastの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

VoronezhはVoronezh Oblastにある人口1,050,000の都市です。A historic city in the Black Earth region, a major industrial and cultural center with a well-preserved 18th-century center.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
